notes:
Faster start.

Starting a book and resuming after pause were slow before audio began. The phone's text-to-speech engine takes ~2s to wake up the first time, and the app was also reloading the voice and restarting the engine on every play even when nothing changed.

Now the engine is warmed up at launch, the voice is only set when it changes, and the needless restart is gone — narration should begin much quicker, especially on resume.

If things still feel slow in general (not just audio), tell me if it's better with Rain effects off (Settings).
